description:
Kangaroo is a SQL client and admin tool.

Kangaroo is a AI-powered SQL client and admin tool for Oracle database, support table design, query, model, sync, export/import etc, focus on comfortable, fun and developer friendly.
New features & bug-fixes
- Preview markdown text support
- Google Gemini candidates API support
- Anthropic Claude messages API support
- Model switch support
- Conversation save and load support
- Conversation list support
- Open conversation in pane/view/window support
- New conversation in pane/view/window support
- Conversation list and chat view switch support
- Retry last message with custom model support
- Scroll to last user prompt support
- Scroll to top most message support
- Model pulling with API compatibility support
- Merge AI setting page into Preference dialog
- Switch from libcurl to libsoup3 library
- Improve recent item's time format
- Update Chinese translation (zh-CN/zh-SG/zh-Hans/zh-Hant)
